lever: the connected_components_borrowed BFS and node_connected_component DFS scanned ALL O(|E|) edges with no early exit (same as is_connected pre-3ab1b0c67). Once every node is visited (nodes_touched/visited_count == n) all components are fully enumerated, so the remaining queued/stacked nodes' edges are pure redundant scanning. Add the early break. node_connected_component switched from pop-time to mark-time accumulation (set-wrapped by the Python wrapper -> order-invisible) to enable the break.

parity.coverage: complete/cycle/path/ba, multi-component disjoint unions (2/3 comp), isolates, 20 random gnp; connected_components set-equality + number_connected_components + node_connected_component

headline: connected_components family early-exit: number_connected_components 5.28x slower -> 11-33x FASTER on dense (57x self-speedup); node_connected_component 7.45x -> 1.45x (2-25x faster elsewhere). Byte-exact. Continues the is_connected early-exit vein (3ab1b0c67).
residual: node_connected_component K601 1.45x = the final O(V) string materialization (names[i].to_owned()) that nx avoids; connected-graph fast path now O(V).
